title: Interstellar Drive-In – 2188pcs Retro-Futuristic UFO Diner Building Kit with LED Lights, Modular Design, Collectible Model for Adults, Gift & Display
features: 【Retro-Futuristic Drive-In Restaurant】 Recreate a classic American diner with a futuristic flying saucer roof, multiple parking and drive-thru spots, and iconic Googie-style architecture, offering a stunning collectible for enthusiasts and road trip lovers.

【Modular & Movable Structure】 Easily assemble, disassemble, and rearrange the restaurant and parking shelters to customize your display or play setup, giving endless creative possibilities for hands-on enjoyment and exhibition.

【Immersive Scene Details】 Features bar area, order windows, outdoor seating, neon lights, and detailed interior elements like tables, chairs, jukebox, and food items—allowing minifigures to interact in realistic diner scenarios.

【Classic Vehicles & Character Interaction】 Includes retro-styled cars and four minifigures (barista/chef, two waiters, and a stylish passenger) to enhance storytelling and bring the Interstellar Drive-In to life, perfect for collectors and display setups.

【Integrated LED Lighting & 2-Year Warranty】 14 LED light points highlight the flying saucer and diner exterior, combining lights seamlessly with the build. Backed by a 2-year warranty for peace of mind, ideal as a unique gift or collectible display piece.
